The Fabelmans (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,348,945Details
International Box Office $25,922,510
Worldwide Box Office $43,271,455
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $918,868
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,303,620
Total $2,222,488
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A deeply personal portrait of 20th Century American childhood, Steven Spielberg’s The Fabelmans is a coming-of-age story about a young man’s discovery of a shattering family secret and an exploration of the power of movies to help us see the truth about each other and ourselves.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$161,579 (0.9% of total gross)
Legs:7.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,962 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,469,086

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 11th, 2022 (Limited) by Universal
November 23rd, 2022 (Expands Wide) by Universal
International Releases: November 24th, 2022 (Wide), released as Fabelmanovi (Czech Republic)
November 25th, 2022 (Limited) (Romania)
December 8th, 2022 (Limited), released as Fabelmanovci (Slovakia)
December 16th, 2022 (Wide) (Italy)
December 22nd, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: January 17th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some strong language, thematic elements, brief violence and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2738 (cert #53875), 6/29/2022)
Running Time: 151 minutes
Award nomination: 2023 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Golden Globe Winner Best Director—Motion Picture, Golden Globe Winner Best Picture—Drama
Cast, crew, or production detail: Autobiographical
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Geographical setting: Arizona
Plot point: Biography, Coming of Age
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1940s, 1950s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Amblin Entertainment, Reliance Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A deeply personal portrait of 20th Century American childhood, Steven Spielberg’s The Fabelmans is a coming-of-age story about a young man’s discovery of a shattering family secret and an exploration of the power of movies to help us see the truth about each other and ourselves.
